name: xrate
description: Chrome extension that converts selected currency amounts with official exchange rates.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.package: npm run verify && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && V=$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') && rm -f xrate-$V.zip && cd dist && zip -qr ../xrate-$V.zip . && echo "Packaged xrate-$V.zip"
